title: Phi Concept Collection
description: Schema for Phi language concept collections organized by part of speech and semantic category

description.description: Brief description of the concept collection

total_concepts.description: Total number of concepts in this collection

sections.description: List of section names organizing the concepts

cultural_focus.description: Statement of the cultural values and approach embodied in these concepts

research_sources.description: Optional list of research sources used to develop these concepts

id.description: Unique identifier for the concept using lowercase letters and underscores

phi_word.description: The Phi word for this concept (empty string if not yet generated)

pattern.description: Phonotactic pattern for this word type (e.g., '[C/F][V/P][F][P]' for nouns)

pos.description: Part of speech for this concept

validation.description: Optional validation status of the generated Phi word

concept_description.description: Concise description of what this concept refers to - should describe a concrete, nameable thing for nouns

cultural_meaning.description: How this concept reflects Phi's cultural values and worldview, often contrasting with mainstream approaches

additionalProperties.description: Translations in other languages (language code as key)

tags.description: Descriptive tags using lowercase letters and underscores

related_concepts.description: IDs of related concepts within this collection or others

usage_contexts.description: Contexts or situations where this concept would be used

section.description: Which section this concept belongs to (must match one of the sections in metadata)
